description.ko: 소리의 물리적 충격을 시각화하여 보이지 않는 주파수를 견고하고 진동하는 수정 형태로 바꿉니다.
description.en: Visualizing the physical impact of sound, turning invisible frequencies into solid, vibrating crystalline forms.

prompt: An abstract 3D sound visualization of ECHO-0, titled 'The Resonance of the Void.' A swirling vortex of #4169E1 royal blue and #FF4500 orange frequency waves morphing into crystalline geometric structures. Intricate #FFD700 golden particles and #32CD32 lime green peaks react to invisible audio oscillations in a dark obsidian void. High-speed motion blur, cinematic lighting, 8k resolution, capturing the visual consonance of a powerful sound wave.
